title: Genius.
content:
There was once a young man quite erratic
        Who lived all alone in an attic,
     He wrote magazine verse
        That made editors curse,
     But his friends thought it fine and dramatic.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edwin C. Ranck, titled "Genius.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
